title: Splash Cleaner
description: Did some resource pack change the title screen splash text? This one will overwrite the changes with the vanilla splash text. An additional 100+ texts have also been included!
body:
# Splash Cleaner!
_Has one of your resource packs overwritten the title splash text with annoying self promotions?_

_**This resource pack fixes it**_ by **overwriting** & **restoring** the vanilla splash text. Additionally, new (non-self-promo) texts have been added for more flavor in your title screen viewing diet! Check out the samples in the Gallery!

**_Compatible with all versions from alpha to beyond!_**

**Please note:** After loading the pack a restart of the game may be required to see the changes to the splash. Please ensure that the pack is loaded at the top most layer, as this will overwrite the offending packs beneath it.

_Enjoy my work? Buy me a coffee! Link in the sidebar!_
